name: cyanheads/socrata-mcp-server
description: MCP server wrapping the Socrata SODA 2.1 API and Discovery API for government open data.

environmentVariables.name: SOCRATA_APP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Socrata app token for higher rate limits. Free to register at any portal. Without a token, requests share a throttled pool per source IP.

environmentVariables.name: SOCRATA_DEFAULT_DOMAIN
environmentVariables.description: Default portal domain when domain is omitted from tool calls (e.g. data.seattle.gov).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
